name: T3-WF-3 integration denied
description: The workflow grants NO integrations, yet the agent is told to use a connected provider (exa). list_providers must not show it, a forced call gets a scope 403, and zero upstream calls happen. Version-pinned tier-3 fixture (specs/developing/testing/scenarios.md#T3-WF-3). The provider the scenario connects (default exa) is deliberately absent from this definition's `integrations`.

steps.label: Attempt the ungranted provider
steps.prompt: List your available integration providers through the proliferate_integrations MCP. Then attempt a web search for {{inputs.query}} using the exa provider. exa is NOT granted to this run, so expect a scope denial — do not retry more than once.

steps.label: Emit the probe result
steps.name: probe_result
steps.prompt: Report whether exa appeared in your provider list and whether the search call was allowed or denied, including any error code you saw.
